lead.description: About ExtraSlice: ExtraSlice is a trailblazer in the tech industry, continually adapting to our clients' ever-evolving needs. Our growth has been a journey of constant innovation: 2021 - Present: Pioneering WaaS Embracing the future of work, we evolved into a Work-as-a-Service (WaaS) provider with a sharp focus on Proptech. Our mission is to streamline the office leasing process by offering diverse options, from single-tenant offices to co-tenancy spaces, all while serving tenants and landlords with flexibility, efficiency, and choice. 2016 - 2020:
